'''âj-ch-t''' ('''kajachat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knowe|knowe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knowe|knowe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kajachat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijachat|thijachat]] || [[word:jijachat|jijachat]] || [[word:shijachat|shijachat]] || [[word:kijachat|kijachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujachat|thuthujachat]] || [[word:jujujachat|jujujachat]] || [[word:shushujachat|shushujachat]] || [[word:kukujachat|kukujachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujachat|thujachat]] || [[word:jujachat|jujachat]] || [[word:shujachat|shujachat]] || [[word:kujachat|kujachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujachat|thujachat]] || [[word:jujachat|jujachat]] || [[word:shujachat|shujachat]] || [[word:kujachat|kujachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejachat|thejachat]] || [[word:jejachat|jejachat]] || [[word:shejachat|shejachat]] || [[word:kejachat|kejachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojachat|thothojachat]] || [[word:jojojachat|jojojachat]] || [[word:shoshojachat|shoshojachat]] || [[word:kokojachat|kokojachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojachat|thojachat]] || [[word:jojachat|jojachat]] || [[word:shojachat|shojachat]] || [[word:kojachat|kojachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojachat|thojachat]] || [[word:jojachat|jojachat]] || [[word:shojachat|shojachat]] || [[word:kojachat|kojachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjachat|thĂŠjachat]] || [[word:jĂŠjachat|jĂŠjachat]] || [[word:shĂŠjachat|shĂŠjachat]] || [[word:kĂŠjachat|kĂŠjachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajachat|thathajachat]] || [[word:jajajachat|jajajachat]] || [[word:shashajachat|shashajachat]] || [[word:kakajachat|kakajachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajachat|thajachat]] || [[word:jajachat|jajachat]] || [[word:shajachat|shajachat]] || [[word:kajachat|kajachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajachat|thajachat]] || [[word:jajachat|jajachat]] || [[word:shajachat|shajachat]] || [[word:kajachat|kajachat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajachat|shajachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajachat|goshajachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajachat|gokishajachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajachatnĂŒ|shajachatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajachatnknĂŒ|goshajachatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajachatnĂŒ|gokishajachatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajachatshĂ«|shajachatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajachatnkshĂ«|goshajachatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajachatshĂ«|gokishajachatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajachatro|shajachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajachatnkro|goshajachatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajachatro|gokishajachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajachatmu|shajachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajachatnkmu|goshajachatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajachatmu|gokishajachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajachatsher|shajachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajachatnksher|goshajachatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajachatsher|gokishajachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajachatng|shajachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajachatnkng|goshajachatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajachatng|gokishajachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajachatya|shajachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajachatnkya|goshajachatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajachatya|gokishajachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajachatyam|shajachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajachatnkyam|goshajachatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajachatyam|gokishajachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajachatnĂŒshĂ«|shajachatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajachatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajachatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajachatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajachatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajachatnĂŒro|shajachatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajachatnknĂŒro|goshajachatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajachatnĂŒro|gokishajachatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajachatnĂŒmu|shajachatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajachatnknĂŒmu|goshajachatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajachatnĂŒmu|gokishajachatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajachatshĂ«nĂŒ|shajachatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajachatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajachatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajachatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajachatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajachatshĂ«ro|shajachatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajachatnkshĂ«ro|goshajachatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajachatshĂ«ro|gokishajachatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajachatshĂ«mu|shajachatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajachatnkshĂ«mu|goshajachatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajachatshĂ«mu|gokishajachatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajachatronĂŒ|shajachatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajachatnkronĂŒ|goshajachatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajachatronĂŒ|gokishajachatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajachatroshĂ«|shajachatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajachatnkroshĂ«|goshajachatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajachatroshĂ«|gokishajachatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajachatromu|shajachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajachatnkromu|goshajachatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajachatromu|gokishajachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajachatmunĂŒ|shajachatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajachatnkmunĂŒ|goshajachatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajachatmunĂŒ|gokishajachatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajachatmushĂ«|shajachatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajachatnkmushĂ«|goshajachatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajachatmushĂ«|gokishajachatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajachatmuro|shajachatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajachatnkmuro|goshajachatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajachatmuro|gokishajachatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
